entry.title: Re: How do I pass selection parameter range into BDC?
entry.content: Didn't get you question, please elaborate briefly.

entry.title: Re: renumber gl accounts
entry.content:
Hi Connie,
I would recommend you to renumber the accounts instead of using alternative Chart of Accounts. The main advantage of renumbering the YCOA is the new g/l account IDs will be updated automatically in account determination. However, please consider restrictions of renumbering g/l accounts which is only possible before first postings in the test system (assuming you are having 3SL). 

For more information, please find the Chart of Accounts Configuration - Overview.pptx (SAP Customer) accelerator on Roadmap Viewer. 

Kind regards
Johannes

entry.title: Re: Reverting Container to the latest published version CLEARS ALL COMPONENTS of my app
entry.content: I just tried but the build process still fails after 2 weeks of trying. The error report looks the same as above. It would help if it gave some kind of clue as to where the fault is located.

entry.title: Routes cannot be mapped to destinations in different spaces
entry.content:
Hi All,

I am trying to practice using BTP trial account. I developed a very simple .go app and was trying to deploy from VS code terminal to the sub-account under the global account. I have also created the space quota and assigned to the dev space which am using. 

When I try to deploy the app using VS code in terminal using command cf push, it gives me this error : 'Routes cannot be mapped to destinations in different spaces'. Am not sure what to do. When I tried the command cf routes, it says no routes found. I am not able to deploy my application. Please help. 

The manifest.yml looks as below:

---
applications:
- name: firstapp
memory: 256M
buildpacks:
- go_buildpack
 
#btp #cfcli #vscode

entry.title: Decsription of field query "Agentur für Arbeit" in RPO
entry.content:
Hello dear community, today I would like to ask the German SAP SF community if you know if there is an interface description of the “Agentur für Arbeit” fields in Successfactors Recruiting RPO? By this I mean the description of all the fields that the employment agency transfers to SF REC via integration. My customer does not understand the content of some of the field queries. I can't find any descriptions online. So I don't need a technical description of the interface and how it works via RPO, but rather a guide to all the queries that the "Agentur für Arbeit" makes.

Thank you!

entry.title: Re: How to programmatically switch detail tabs in MIGO
entry.content:
I guess that you're looking for a user exit. The buttons of a tabstrip control in a Dynpro are static, the only possibility to have them variable is that the program implements a generic text for each, but you can see by yourself that it's not the case here.

Debugger Dynpro Analysis:

SAPLMIGO 0300

Screen Variants and GuiXT can't move tabs, maybe SAP Screen Personas can?

Otherwise, go for a modification of the standard.

entry.title: Re: Display dunning history - display dunning letter with...
entry.content:
Reposting Martin's comment as reply to "close" the question for internal purposes

------------
Hi Eli,

That is the standard behavior in the Display Dunning History app. To see it without the watermark, use the Create Dunning Notices app. In the app, go to Menu -> Goto -> Output, then use the Display Document button. 

Kind regards,

Martin

entry.title: Re: Dynamic programming fail: pass table TYPE cds as a parameter
entry.content:
I expect this will lead to a dump if you try to change the data at t_items within the method get_data or another place.

The reason is, that it changes the data at i_t_data_obs too which is not allowed for importing parameters. If you really want this, you can do something like the following. There the table is given as changing parameter to the generic class.

REPORT ytmp.

CLASS lcl_caller DEFINITION.

  PUBLIC SECTION.
    METHODS:
      start.

  PRIVATE SECTION.
    DATA:
          mt_data TYPE STANDARD TABLE OF bkpf.

ENDCLASS.

CLASS lcl_handler DEFINITION.

  PUBLIC SECTION.
    METHODS:
      set_data_ref
        IMPORTING
          iv_type TYPE string
        CHANGING
          ct_data TYPE STANDARD TABLE,
      get_data.

  PRIVATE SECTION.
    DATA:
      mr_data TYPE REF TO data,
      mv_type TYPE string.

ENDCLASS.


END-OF-SELECTION.
  NEW lcl_caller( )->start( ).

CLASS lcl_caller IMPLEMENTATION.

  METHOD start.

    DATA(lo_handler) = NEW lcl_handler( ).
    lo_handler->set_data_ref(
      EXPORTING
        iv_type = 'BKPF'
      CHANGING
        ct_data = mt_data
    ).
    lo_handler->get_data( ).


    WRITE: lines( mt_data ).
  ENDMETHOD.

ENDCLASS.

CLASS lcl_handler IMPLEMENTATION.

  METHOD set_data_ref.

    mv_type = iv_type.
    GET REFERENCE OF ct_data INTO mr_data.

  ENDMETHOD.

  METHOD get_data.

    FIELD-SYMBOLS: <lt_data> TYPE STANDARD TABLE.

    ASSIGN mr_data->* TO <lt_data>.

    SELECT * UP TO 10 ROWS FROM (mv_type) INTO TABLE <lt_data>.

  ENDMETHOD.

ENDCLASS.

entry.title: How to use standard text in labels in s4hana public cloud ?
entry.content:
Hello All,

how use the standard text in labels in S4HANA public cloud ? 

Thanks and Regards,

Gowthami Gunji

entry.title: write 'Hello fellow consultants'.
entry.content: Hello fellow consultants. I am new here in the community.

entry.title: Re: how do I change the end date of the sale price in bulk
entry.content:
You can use excel to update the end date for each price condition record in Manage Prices - Sales App. Please download the price condition records as excel file and update the Valid To field only for each condition record, then you can import this excel file. 

You can refer to this blog for more details: https://community.sap.com/t5/enterprise-resource-planning-blogs-by-sap/upload-prices-in-sales-from-template-based-spreadsheet/ba-p/12852826.

entry.title: Re: Employee Time Calculations
entry.content:
Hi, we plan to provide a standard solution for this scenario in H1 2025. If you can´t wait till that, you might check if you find something in this blog that helps you: https://community.sap.com/t5/human-capital-management-blogs-by-sap/configuring-first-half-or-second-half-leave-request-scenario/ba-p/13490060

Regards

Volker

entry.title: Re: Dynamic programming fail: pass table TYPE cds as a parameter
entry.content: You have posted to Discussions instead of Q&A, so you can't mark any solution. How to ask a question, see here: Solved: How to ask a question in SAP Community >= 2024 - SAP Community.

entry.title: Is it possible to impute SD revenues into REFX objects in S/4HANA
entry.content:
Dear colleagues,

Is it now possible in S/4HANA (2022) to impute revenues posted through SD purchase process directly onto an RE-FX object (instead of eOTP, or other classical CO imputation)?
We have looked, we think, everywhere in the customizing, but could not find any place where we could activate RE-FX imputation in SD. For example, in MM no problem, the activation simply takes place in the customizing.

Thank you for your help.

Kind regards,

Benoit

entry.title: Re: Dimensional Weight Profile with Normalized Quantities...
entry.content:
Indeed I have analyzed the dimensional weight profile function, but the dimensional weight profile just recognizes the volume of the cargo, not the NLQ/ALQ quantity.

If I would have the m3 of the cargo, then it's easy, but I have only the loading meters available (ALQ).

entry.title: "Numeric material numbers already exist in system" occurs when resetting lexicographical indicator
entry.content:
We have the need to manage potentially materials with leading zeros. 

 

Therefore we are trying to set back the flag "Lexicographical" in product master configuration 'Define Output Format of Material Numbers'. Given that materials already exist in the system, this flag cannot be changed due to the error "Numeric material numbers already exist in system"

 

We are aware of it, but what options do we have to restore it back?  Do we need to cancel all materials?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: "Numeric material numbers already exist in system" oc...
entry.content:
The Issues is documented in the KBA https://launchpad.support.sap.com/#/notes/3516603

 

If there are numeric material numbers in the system they will all need to be archived, only after this will be able to set or reset the indicator

 

In S/4HANA Cloud the Archiving Object MM_MATNR can be used

entry.title: Change M8194 warning message as a pop up message
entry.content:
Hi All

Is there a way we can change warning message as pop up message? I m trying to change message M8194 which we get in MIRO/MIR7 during parking or posting of PO invoice. I already tried adding message M8194 in Tcode-OMRM and making it information message but this doesn't work. At the moment I want to avoid making change through ABAP.

Regards

Pankaj

entry.title: Re: In Learning.SAP do we have any courses for SAP Advanc...
entry.content:
Hi @AnjaniAL 
Can you please provide the related product?
e.g.

  • Recapping Workflow Management for Workflow Automated Actions in SAP Commerce Cloud
    In this video, you will learn about the Workflow concept in SAP Commerce Cloud. You will get an overview about the key features of Workflows extension, and how to manage them within the Backoffice application.
  • Developing Business Processes with SAP Process Orchestration
    This learning journey is designed for integration designers and developers with responsibilities for building business processes and integration scenarios with SAP Process Orchestration.

  • Creating Processes and Automations with SAP Build Process Automation
    This learning journey will introduce you to all the important aspects of SAP Build Process Automation, from reusing existing content to building your own automations and processes.
    Please check unit 5 Using Features of Advanced Process Building in SAP Build Process Automation.

Kind regards
Margit

entry.title: Calculation View - UPG BW4HANA 2021
entry.content:
After the upgrade to BW4HANA 2021, the Calculation Views on the system failed.

We can't even create new Calculation Views by recalling the Composite BWs in the Projections.
This is what it looks like:

Furthermore, if I try to do a Data Preview on the previously created Composite I can see the data correctly, if I try to do a Data Preview in the projection of the Calculation View I receive the following error:

I would like to point out that before the release upgrade everything was working

Thanks

Best Regards 

Francesco

entry.title: Re: How do I pass selection parameter range into BDC?
entry.content:
Hello @walkerist 

You should use SUBMIT not BDC as it is a report not a dialog transaction.

Best regards

Dominik Tylczynski

Thank you for your blog!!

I have tried to do this using std. BADI: WF_TASK_SUPPORT but its coming again.

I have redefined below interface method and passed these button properties as abap_false but still button are loading.

IF_WF_TASK_SUPPORT~GET_MULTIPLE_TASK_SUPPORT

Please suggest me.

Thanks,

Ranjeet Pisal.

entry.title: Re: Digital Skills Initiative Applicant Guide (For self-study candidates)
entry.content:
Hello @David_Chaviano 

I am Trisha and I am currently a final year student in B-Tech pursuing a degree in Computer Science with a specialization in Data Science. I have explored multiple fields in the broad category of Computer Science and within my research on cloud computing I came across SAP S4HANA.  Since the concept was fairly new to me, I started my groundwork with SAP ABAP which has encouraged me to take this exam.

After graduation I hope to work for a company like SAP to grow my experience, serve clients and eventually become a successful SAP consultant under your company. I would be thrilled to receive this opportunity since it will bring me closer to my goal.

Thank you for your consideration

Trisha Mehta

entry.title: Re: How do I pass selection parameter range into BDC?

entry.title: FTP or SFTP Receiver Adapter in SAP Integration Suite allows Mainframe commands?
entry.content:
Hi experts, 

I have a question. It is possible to use FTP or SFTP receiver adapter to a Mainframe system and send files using also HOST commands like sbd\=(IBM-284,ISO8859-15) QUOTE LRECL\=46 RECFM=FB BLKSIZE\=6132 CYLINDERS PRIMARY\=1 SECONDARY\=1 ?

I have read the SAP PO allows, but SAP Integration Suite Cloud Integration can?

Regards.

entry.title: My Concur expense postings in S/4HANA Cloud do not have 'service rendered dates'. Is this supported?
entry.content:
Dear PSA Experts,

We have expenses posted from Concur. But they do not seem to carry the service rendered to date. Due to this PSA billing preparation doesn't pick them up. The situation is something like this.

The employee created an expense claim in Concur on Sept 27th, it was approved on the 29th and posted to S/4HANA Cloud Finance on 3rd October. 

My PSA project billing element has a billing due date of 30th September. When I execute the app Manage Project Billing, this posting doesn't appear because it was posted on 3rd October and doesn't have a 'service rendered date'.

Does the Concur - S/4 interface support service rendered date?

Any help is highly appreciated.

Regards, Aavantika

entry.title: Configuration for manual Absence Days in IT2001
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

May I know how to change the "Absence Days" in IT2001 from system automatically calculation to manually input?

For example, within the Start Date to End Date 01.01.2024 to 31.01.2024, the absence days was 10.

My rationale behind is to make the input as simple as possible, no need to set employee's factory own calendar, checking on Saturdays, Sundays, Public Holidays or working days.

My company is using HCM in ECC 6.0, not SuccessFactor in S4HANA.

Thanks & regards,

James

entry.title: Re: BEHAVIOR_ILLEGAL_STATEMENT during Validation on Save
entry.content:
Hi @abaper007, 

According to the document below, by using saver class CL_ABAP_BEHAVIOR_SAVER_FAILED instead of the default CL_ABAP_BEHAVIOR_SAVER, save_modified method will include failed and reported parameters.

https://help.sap.com/doc/abapdocu_latest_index_htm/latest/en-US/index.htm?file=abenabp_cl_abap_beh_saver_failed.htm

entry.title: Re: SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud_FSCM_credit limit_custom app...
entry.content: Hi Vivek, Here is the business requirement. If a customer has exceeded credit limit of INR 5000000 and the maximum credit period 7 days, it should trigger an approval workflow (for case that exceeds the time or amount) to both CEO (Level 1) & Managing Director (Level 2) and it should be approved by both of them (CEO & MD)Thank you, kind regards Thangaraj Thomas

entry.title: How to control externally the iflow in integration suite?
entry.content:
How to control externally the iflow in integration suite? i.e. What is the substitute of external channel concept of SAP PO in SAP Integration Suite?
We have current scenario in PO that we are externally controlling the channels from ABAP program. How we can achieve this in Integration Suite?

entry.title: SAP Stammtisch in Leipzig
entry.content:
Liebe SAP Community!

Wir sind am 14. Oktober 2024 anlässlich des DSAG-Kongresses in Leipzig . Alle die ebenfalls vor Ort sind laden wir herzlich zu einem Stammtisch in Leipzig ein!

Wir freuen uns auf euch!

Judith & Peter aus Hamburg

entry.title: Re: Limit warehouse order for PI document
entry.content:
Hi,

did you select the correct limit value type (Physical Inventory)?

That only leave the max / min number of items (and the open limit size parameter) open.

Brgds

Juergen

---
All the above is no official SAP statement.

Want to learn EWM?
Check for EWM courses: https://training.sap.com/trainingpath/Applications-Extended+Warehouse+Management-EWM+in+S4HANA
Get a SAP Learning Hub Subscription: https://training.sap.com/learninghub

And it is EWM. NOT eWM - Duh!
And if your question includes the word "transfer order" - do NOT tag the question with Extended Warehouse Management!

entry.title: Circular Table Join between KNA1 & KNVP
entry.content:
Hello, I am trying to use SQVI to build a table join and am struggling with one part of it. 

I would like to be able to use the company code and partner function in KNVP as selection criteria to find a list of customers with their name and address (I can easily add ADRC to the table join to get detailed address details if required) and who is the sales person responsible for that customer (KUNN2 in KNVP). 

When I build the link of KNA1 to KNVP using KUNNR, it gives me the customer name and address details (even if I have to add ADRC it's easy). Problem is that now I end up with a "customer number" for my sales person responsible in KUNN2. 

I need now to run the circular reference to again look up KUNN2 = KUNNR in KNA1 to get his name vs just his SAP Customer Number. I dont know how to run this circular lookup. Does anyone else have any clue how to do this?

Activation of the PI documents was done from the monitor.

Sorin

entry.title: SAP CodeJam HANA ML in Portugal 2024-09 Recap
entry.content:
At the end of September, we held two SAP CodeJam events in Portugal: in Lisbon and Porto. The events focused on getting started with Machine Learning using SAP HANA and Python.

Events where opened by organizers: @jaimecordeiro in Lisbon, and @MRobalinho in Porto.

SAP CodeJam in Porto was the day before the very first SAP Inside Track there, so it was great to share a drink during a Stammtisch after the CodeJam...

...and to present SAP HANA multi-model capabilities at SIT.

In the meantime @marco_v_santos discussed SAP Community with participants.

I always take the opportunity to experience at least a little bit of the city I am in, so you can see my photos:

  • Lisbon: https://www.instagram.com/p/DAW1Gm1sl7d/
  • Porto and Vila Nova de Gaia: https://www.instagram.com/p/DAeULr2ML3C/

Now, the next stop is in Wrocław on October 30th.

Would you like to host such an SAP CodeJam? Here are the details: https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-sap/quot-getting-started-with-machine-learning-using-sap-hana-quot-as-a-new-sap/ba-p/13574098

Iam Mohamed Diaa from Egypt.

I'm eager to do a certification for SAP HCM and contribute my learning and skills back to the global HR ecosystem of customers and partners.
This is truly an amazing initiative by SAP and a great opportunity for me. I'm positively looking forward to hearing back from you.

Mohamed Diaa

The field is a input field and it is not in display mode. Could you please help on this
Note: We have used the same field in service order , quotation , contracts . There it is working fine.

entry.title: Re: Email Template Token Not Rendering HTML Content
entry.content: Impossible to render HTML coming from MDF objects

entry.title: Re: SAP Signavio License Types
entry.content:
Hello gstill,

Thanks for your request!

  • Overview of roles: In this documentation, you can find an overview of different roles and their related access rights in SAP Signavio Collaboration Hub: Manage Access Rights | SAP Help Portal
  • License Types: SAP Signavio Collaboration Hub Users need a license in order to view diagrams/content and are managed in the User Management section. All users are able to view published content while users with creation privileges can also view preview content. SAP Signavio Process Manager users can invite internal and external process stakeholders to review and comment on diagrams. Internal users already have a SAP Signavio account. Externals need to create an account to log in. It is not needed to have a S-User ID, so the mail address connected to their Signavio account is sufficient. External users, who do not have a license to the workspace, can be actively invited to view or to give feedback to a specific diagram. Then, the external users automatically get a commenting license (without additional costs). They can only view/comment on the diagram for which they have received the invitation in SAP Signavio Process Collaboration Hub. For more information, please check out this documentation: About Licenses | SAP Help Portal
  • Pricing: Rearding our prices of SAP Signavio Collaboration Hub licences, I am kindly asking you to contact our sales team. If you would like me to forward you to the responsible team, please contact us via signavio_success@sap.com .
  • User Management/Groups: Managing access rights for individual users becomes hard to manage with a large number of users and a lot of content. We recommend that you create user groups to manage access rights and access to features.
  • Storage/Sharing of Process Diagrams: One of our best practices is to grant users the minimum level of authorization that is necessary for their work. Thus, our recommendation would be to assign Collaboration Hub licences only to those employees for whom the process diagrams are relevant. Alternatively, you can invite external stakeholders like mentioned above. Nevertheless, if you want to make process diagrams accessible/visible to a larger audience (without Hub licences), you can export them and upload them internally. Please find here more information about different export options: Exporting | SAP Help Portal

I hope this helps. In case of further questions, feel free to reach out to signavio_success@sap.com or post it here.

Kind regards
Ascha (Virtual Customer Success Partner - SAP Signavio)

entry.title: Re: Transporting Profit and Cost Center Hierarchies Created in S/4HANA Using the Manage Fiori App
entry.content: With reference to SAP Help Site: Except for the hierarchy type Financial Statement Version (FSV), all the hierarchies can be maintained directly in the production system or exported and imported between systems without transport requests.

entry.title: Re: Transporting Profit and Cost Center Hierarchies Created in S/4HANA Using the Manage Fiori App
entry.content: With reference to SAP Help Site: Except for the hierarchy type Financial Statement Version (FSV), all the hierarchies can be maintained directly in the production system or exported and imported between systems without transport requests. https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_ON-PREMISE/5e23dc8fe9be4fd496f8ab556667ea05/8e040a45e4db4e6abd426bee0a86dc8a.html?version=2023.001

entry.title: Re: Exposed SAP S/4HANA Federated content in SAP Workzone give Internal Server Error
entry.content: Hi akhthaaralibadhusha, afair, you shouldn't use special characters in the Destination Name (both dt + rt), in the screenshots there is a '_' (underscore) visible behind the red dot. Further, please check that you meet the config specs according to https://help.sap.com/docs/CIAS%20FES%202020/ecb81b5bfce440ca8e7e7c9ad58fcf3a/68a94ee6019a48b4b9e496c60fe4b048.html

entry.title: Re: My Concur expense postings in S/4HANA Cloud do not ha...
entry.content:
Dear Aavantika,

Thank you for asking this question in the SAP Community. The short answer is yes - the service rendered date in S/4HANA Cloud public edition can be populated from Concur. To do this, you need to enable the option "Fill Service Rendered Date (FBUDA) with transaction date" in the posting settings of the expense report for financial postings. As a result, the transaction date of the expense report item in Concur will be transferred to the "service rendered" date (FBUDA) on the journal entry item level in S/4HANA Cloud.

As you correctly indicated, this "service rendered date" is crucial during Project Billing. It is used as a first option to determine the service date, which serves as a filter criterion in comparison to the billing due date to display the unbilled cost postings.

I hope this is helpful. Please let me know if you have further questions.

Best regards,

Andreas

entry.title: Fiori Analytical List Page use InA service on-premise?
entry.content:
Hi all,

I'm pretty new to analytical apps. I now need to build an app, which aggregates FI journal data based on countries. There should be a drilldown to all journal entries of a given country.

To achieve this in 2024, my plan was to first build 
1. a CDS view entity with this annotation: @analytics.dataCategory: #CUBE
2. a projection view as transient view with provider contract analytical_query
3. create a service definition
4. create service binding as InA- UI
5. use Fiori Floorplan Analytical ListPage to consume the service

The last one is where I'm struggling with. In VSCode, app generator only provides oData V2 and V4 services but not my newly created InA service. What I'm curious about is that there is no "publish" button at service binding. Also I'm not able to find or activate the service in /IWFND/MAINT_SERVICE

We're running on S/4 HANA 2023 FP1 on-premise. What's the proper way to publish and use an InA Service? How to consume them in Fiori?

This is the CDS Cube

@AccessControl.authorizationCheck: #NOT_REQUIRED
@EndUserText.label: 'Trade Credit Insurance Details'
@Metadata.ignorePropagatedAnnotations: true
@Analytics.dataCategory: #CUBE

define view entity zi_fi_trade_credit_insr_cube
  as select from I_JournalEntryItem
  //composition of target_data_source_name as _association_name
{
  key SourceLedger,
  key CompanyCode,
  key FiscalYear,
  key AccountingDocument,
  key LedgerGLLineItem,
  key Ledger,
  key _Customer.Country,
      Customer,
      PostingDate,
      DocumentDate,
      ClearingDate,

      @DefaultAggregation: #SUM
      @Semantics.amount.currencyCode: 'CompanyCodeCurrency'
      AmountInCompanyCodeCurrency,

      CompanyCodeCurrency,

      @DefaultAggregation: #SUM
      @Semantics.amount.currencyCode: 'TransactionCurrency'
      AmountInBalanceTransacCrcy,

      TransactionCurrency,

      dats_days_between(DocumentDate, $session.system_date) as DueDate,


      _Customer



      //  _association_name // Make association public
}
where
  FinancialAccountType = 'D' // customers only

This is the transient view/projection view

@AbapCatalog.viewEnhancementCategory: [ #NONE ]

@AccessControl.authorizationCheck: #NOT_ALLOWED

@EndUserText.label: 'Trade Credit Insurance'

@Metadata.ignorePropagatedAnnotations: true

@ObjectModel.usageType: { serviceQuality: #X, sizeCategory: #S, dataClass: #MIXED }
define transient view entity zc_fi_trade_credit_insurance
  provider contract analytical_query
  as projection on zi_fi_trade_credit_insr_cube

{
  SourceLedger,
  CompanyCode,
  FiscalYear,
  AccountingDocument,
  LedgerGLLineItem,
  Ledger,
  Country,

  Customer,
  PostingDate,
  DocumentDate,
  ClearingDate,

  @Semantics.amount.currencyCode: 'CompanyCodeCurrency'
  AmountInCompanyCodeCurrency,

  CompanyCodeCurrency,

  @Semantics.amount.currencyCode: 'TransactionCurrency'
  AmountInBalanceTransacCrcy,

  TransactionCurrency,
  DueDate,

  /* Associations */
  _Customer
}

entry.title: Re: SAP and Arm64 version of Windows 11 with Prism emulat...
entry.content: Hi Wolfgang, I was curious about this topic, so I just started today with my third Surface device, which is now running on Windows Arm64. The VPN from the Microsoft Store works fine. I installed the latest 64-bit SAP GUI without any issues and also set up non-native Java with webstart ( javaws.exe, version 8 ) to run the PI/PO Swing tools. I couldn't get native OpenJava to work due to the missing webstart, and OpenWebStart didn't recognize the native one. Next, I'll proceed with ADT. So far, running x64 applications is working well. I can't comment on speed in detail, but everything seems much faster than on my other machines. Thanks for the ADT installation guide! On page 16, under "Microsoft Windows 10TM or higher," it might be helpful to specify x64, given that Arm64 is now in the mix. I'll check soon if the emulation works for the other tools I use daily. Thanks again!

entry.title: Re: Kanban label printing
entry.content: Hello Prasath, yes, the materials have two languages on MAKTX and the system language is also Turkish. I suppose, there is a field that causes this situation, but I haven't found it yet.

entry.title: Re: Get competencies from form
entry.content:
Hi @ThomasLecluyse 

You can't get it without specifying the template id or name

entry.title: Re: 🇩🇪 Getting started with Generative AI Hub on SAP AI Core
entry.content: I am looking forward to it!

entry.title: Re: Seamless planning integration between SAP Analytics Cloud and SAP Datasphere - product FAQ
entry.content:
This means that Datasphere will not be allowed to write data directly into SAP Analytics Cloud’s tables using SAP Datasphere’s data integration tools, such as transformation flows. This is a potential future enhancement.

Could you please shed some light on the possibility of loading actual data from SAP Datasphere into an SAC planning model hosted on SAP Datasphere? Will a new connection type be available?

entry.title: Re: Adapt a Maintenance Notification Type for Use in 9-Phase Maintenance Process of SAP S/4HANA Main
entry.content:
Hi @abg ,

Maybe a bit late, but this can be useful to others.

There should be only one active pair of Semantic Object & Action, this is by design.

You either remove the standard tile from the user or rename one of the two objects (Semantic Object or Action).

You can use transaction /UI2/FLPCM_CUST tab Target Mappings to check.

Best regards,

Antonio

entry.title: Re: 🟡 Petoberfest 2024
DOCUMENT MANAGEMENT SYSTEM Configuration Pack
entry.content:
1)Avoid data redundancy, maintain consistency of data, and
minimize the workload involved in entering and updating your
data.
2)To exchange data quickly and securely. You can access your data
directly using electronic search tools, or find documents using
known parameters.
3) Search for and display documents (original application files). By
reducing access time and the workload involved in routine tasks,
you can lower your costs considerably.
4)You can use document distribution to distribute documents that
are managed in the document management system (DMS).

entry.title: Re: Modify Table Maintenance Generator
entry.content: It worked without needing to del and recreate the TMG

entry.title: Re: Upload CSV file in CAP JAVA, Validate rows and return...
entry.content: Thank you @skymu89 for mentioning my open source project!

entry.title: Re: Exposed SAP S/4HANA Federated content in SAP Workzone...
entry.content:
I'm pretty convinced it is related to your destination. Can you check you have the following properties in your destination?

Does it work for a native Fiori app? Or only for webgui and wda?

entry.title: Re: Enabling SAP Build Process Automation's My Inbox App in SAP Build Work Zone, Standard Edition
entry.content: I did all the steps and i can access MyInbox from Work Zone. I can also see the tasks on the left menue but i can'T open the tasks. When i clock on an task it should normally opens up but in my case nothing happens. Can anybody give me an hint or link or something?

entry.title: Re: How to understand the FI postings made in SD down payment scenario?
entry.content:
Hello Alex,

thank you for your blog. I am currently facing an issue with sales down payment process. Customers requirement is to process down payments with two output taxes on one item -> we have implemented logistic costs condition type into our pricing procedure. These logistic costs depends on total value and weight of sales order. These logistic costs are also tax liable = there is 20% tax on these costs (service rendered output tax). There is also tax code for the line item (material) itself an this tax code can vary from 0- 10 - 20% (output tax). The problem is, that we need system to create noted items (F) for two or more tax codes - not only for one. In my case, I created FAZ document that respects two output tax tax codes (E1 20%, E0 10%) in the Conditions tab BUT when saving the document the created noted F - lines are only with one tax code (the system merges the tax values from those different tax codes and assigns the value to one tax code e.i. E1 - 20% ) -> which is definitely not correct! Because when entering F-29 with respect to various tax codes (as stated in original sales order), the net values and tax values do not match the F -lines created by FAZ document.

Do you have any advise, please?

Thank you.

Martina

entry.title: Re: My Concur expense postings in S/4HANA Cloud do not ha...
entry.content: Thank you, Andreas. I was able to locate this config. Will turn this ON and test.

entry.title: BAPI for Tcode VF31F
entry.content:
I would like to know what is the BAPI use for Tcode VF31F.
I have set my dispatch time to "scheduled" in OPD, and my custom program will trigger VF31F to send out the output I set. Thus, would like to know what is the BAPI to use in VF31F to trigger the output run in S/4 Hana.

entry.title: Re: How to get the get communication system id in multi t...
entry.content: Hi Ingo! Thanks for you answer. That's what I was looking for.

entry.title: Re: 401 Unauthorized error calling odata service on on-premise from BTP RAP app
entry.content: The error was a missing user/password in the Destination Service in the BTP Cockpit

entry.title: Re: Queries regarding Data migration approach for PM Data...
entry.content: After the data migration, you can download the mapping steps for the order . It will have the source and target system linkage. Or you can also use extensibility or add a custom field or make use of any non used standard field (text field like text, reference etc.) to store the same.

entry.title: Re: Limit warehouse order for PI document
entry.content:
"In that case, if you have 2 PI documents with 10 st. bins each, it will create one WO for both PI."

What I see in the screenshot is that one WO always has 5 items. 

So the filter works - but I see that is actually not the filter you want.

You wrote "Our target is when activating the PI documents, to have one WO per PI document."

So the max / min number of items is not the correct limit.

So the question is if one of the available fields in the "Field to Limit Warehouse Order Size" is one you can use?

Maybe document id works?

Otherwise the F1 help to this field describes which BAdI can be used to define your own filter field.

Brgds

Juerge4n

entry.title: Re: Sap analytics cloud reset all presentation filters
entry.content:
Hello, Someone has an idea ? I added with scrip Table.getDataSource().removeDimensionFilter(XXXX) but it doesn't work.

I still didn't find how to reset filters (presentation) 

thanks

entry.title: Re: setup salary packaging with different PF earningg persentages of salary packaging
entry.content: Tag SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition Human Resources is not correct here

entry.title: MyInbox in the SAP Build Work Zone lists tasks, but does not display them.
entry.content:
I have subscribet to SAP Build Process Automation and SAP Build Workzone in the same Subaccount. 

On my Work Zone Site i added the Process Trigger and MyInbox component. The Process Trigger works fine but MyInbox isn't working correctly. It lists the assigend Task of an User on the left menue but nothing happens when i click on them to work on the forms.

I created an Destination on the subaccount für SAP Build Process Automation in preparation for MyInbox on Work Zone.

 

SAP Build Process Automation SAP Build Work Zone, standard edition SAP Build Work Zone, advanced edition

entry.title: Hierarchy upload from S/4 publich cloud to BW4H
entry.content:
Hi experts

We are using CDS view IFIGLACCOUNTHN, GL Accounts Hierarchy Nodes, to upload hierarchies from S4H Cloud.

We are using a customer InfoObject BGGLACC instead of 0GL_Account. The field routine has been defined as follows:

if source_fields_3 = 'NODENAME'.

result = 'NODENAME'.

else.

result = 'BGGLACC'.

endif.

While loading data into BW we get this error:

The text information for hierarchy nodes are mantained in the source system.

Where is the error?

Many Thanks!

entry.title: Re: Digital Skills Initiative Applicant Guide (For self-study candidates)
entry.content:
Hello @David_Chaviano,

I’m truly grateful for the opportunity that the SAP Digital Skills Initiative provides. Coming from a background where opportunities in technology have been limited, I resonate with some of the categories highlighted for this initiative:

  • As a first-generation college student, navigating the complexities of education and career development has been both challenging and rewarding.
  • Now, as someone looking to transition their career mid-life, I am deeply motivated to continue growing and learning, with SAP as my focus.

I’ve recently completed my learning journey on implementing SAP S/4HANA Cloud Sales fundamental business processes, and I am eagerly awaiting the chance to take my certification exam. For me, this initiative is more than just a certification — it’s a chance to prove to myself and others that it’s never too late to follow your passion and strive for something greater.

Thank you for this incredible opportunity and for supporting those of us on this journey of transformation. I look forward to taking the next steps.

Best regards,
Ali Ahmed Khan

entry.title: Re: Welcome to the beginner corner!
entry.content:
Hello @David_Chaviano,

I’m truly grateful for the opportunity that the SAP Digital Skills Initiative provides. Coming from a background where opportunities in technology have been limited, I resonate with some of the categories highlighted for this initiative:

  • As a first-generation college student, navigating the complexities of education and career development has been both challenging and rewarding.
  • Now, as someone looking to transition their career mid-life, I am deeply motivated to continue growing and learning, with SAP as my focus.

I’ve recently completed my learning journey on implementing SAP S/4HANA Cloud Sales fundamental business processes, and I am eagerly awaiting the chance to take my certification exam. For me, this initiative is more than just a certification — it’s a chance to prove to myself and others that it’s never too late to follow your passion and strive for something greater.

Thank you for this incredible opportunity and for supporting those of us on this journey of transformation. I look forward to taking the next steps.

Best regards,
Ali Ahmed Khan

entry.title: Re: Image Cropping using FIORI
entry.content: where is the link?

entry.title: Re: SAP COURSE
entry.content:
Hi @Neha35 
If you access e.g. our Learning Journeys site you can filter by topic and / or product
So we provide for numerous SAP product learning materials.

Kind regards
Margit

entry.title: SAP CPI unable to transfer data using message mapping
entry.content:
Hi All , 

I am trying to pass data from a xml schema to another schema(ORDER05) using message mapping. 

Two of the components of the structure E1EDKA1 are not getting populated . Can you please help me in pointing to the right direction . Apologies ahead if it is something already discussed before and I am not able to grasp it as I am new to Integration Suite . 

Below are the screen shots of the mapping in MMAP artifact.

Mapping Picture

 

Mapping expression

Test data ( As you can see the field stras does not even appear on the test output side; while changing the mapping to a constant it does )

 Also attaching the XSD files from both left to right side of schemas.

entry.title: Sub-processes Linking in solution processes
entry.content:
Hi there,
I have the problem that it is not clear to me how to link BPMN diagrams to my subprocesses. As you can see in the picture, I always get the message that no diagram is assigned. I also don't know how to add a diagram. This problem exists in the Solution Process Flow tab.
It would be great if someone could tell me where to store sub-processes so that they are displayed when I want to open the sub-process.

 

SAP Cloud ALM

entry.title: Re: Custom Tasks in Onboarding and Offboarding
entry.content:
Hi thanks for the blog post 🙂
We have a custom ONB task that collects clothing sizes from the onboardee - is there a way to trigger a simple story report to run once completed? - which would then be notified to a certain group of people?
We initially wanted an email output but were told this is not possible ?

thanks Darren

entry.title: Re: Welcome to the beginner corner!
entry.content: I am Ali Ahmed Khan. I’ve completed the SAP S/4HANA Cloud Sales learning journey and am preparing for my certification. I’m excited to grow within the SAP ecosystem and grateful for this opportunity.

entry.title: Re: Value Help Dialog starts disabled ui5
entry.content:
Hi, you need to set RangeKeyFields,like:
oValueHelpDialog.setRangeKeyFields([{ label: "Product", key: "Product" }]);

entry.title: Re: Value Help Dialog starts disabled ui5
entry.content:
Hi, you need to set RangeKeyFields,like:
oValueHelpDialog.setRangeKeyFields([{ label: "Product", key: "Product" }]);

entry.title: Re: CultureNotFoundException
entry.content: and what if you are not allowed by company policy to change the region settings. We have this issue now on Windows 11

entry.title: SAPUI5 uploadSet: Items not getting refreshed after upload
entry.content:
Hi Experts!

I've implemented UploadSet and the files are getting uploaded as expected. But items are not getting refreshed after successful upload. 

 

onUploadCompleted: function (oEvent) {
                var oUploadSet = this.byId("uploadSet");
                oUploadSet.removeAllIncompleteItems();
                oUploadSet.getBinding("items").refresh();
            },
 
There are no errors while debugging.
 

<upload:UploadSet id="uploadSet" instantUpload="false" uploadEnabled="true" afterItemAdded="onAfterItemAdded" uploadCompleted="onUploadCompleted" items="{filteredModel>/items}">

                                    <upload:toolbar />

                                    <upload:items>

                                        <upload:UploadSetItem id="_IDGenUploadSetItem1" fileName="{filteredModel>fileName}" mediaType="{filteredModel>mediaType}" enabledEdit="false" visibleEdit="false" url="{filteredModel>url}" removePressed="onRemovePressed">

                                            <upload:attributes>

                                                <ObjectAttribute id="_IDGenObjectAttribute" title="Uploaded By" text="{filteredModel>createdBy}" active="false" />

                                                <ObjectAttribute id="_IDGenObjectAttribute1" title="Uploaded on" text="{filteredModel>createdAt}" active="false" />

                                                <ObjectAttribute id="_IDGenObjectAttribute2" title="File Size" text="{filteredModel>size}" active="false" />

                                            </upload:attributes>

                                        </upload:UploadSetItem>

                                    </upload:items>

                                </upload:UploadSet>

 

Here I've used JSON model(filteredModel) because the forms entity has 1 to many relationship with the files entity. Hence I'm filtering out the data based on form_id.

 

If I refresh the whole page, I'm getting the expected output.

 

Best regards,

Adarsh

entry.title: Re: Missing "Transactions and Applications" search provid...
entry.content:
For some reason, the "Transactions and Applications" search just out of nowhere some days after the upgrade. 
No cause (configuration change or something) apparent.

entry.title: Re: General data type in xlsx file from SAP Analytics Cloud dashboard
entry.content: Hi, we are seeing the same issue - it started sometime btw September 12th and 23rd.
